title: Manage complex customer issues in an automotive workplace
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage complex customer issues in an automotive workplace demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Examine the nature of the issue

pcs.text: Customer issue and associated feelings and opinions are identified1.2 Facts relating to the issue are determined using appropriate communication skills1.3 Workplace procedures and manufacturer or supplier policy relating to the issue are sourced and interpreted1.4 Further information is researched as required to confirm or clarify issue1.5 Rights and responsibilities of customer and workplace are determined and communicated to customer
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Customer issue and associated feelings and opinions are identified1.2 Facts relating to the issue are determined using appropriate communication skills1.3 Workplace procedures and manufacturer or supplier policy relating to the issue are sourced and interpreted1.4 Further information is researched as required to confirm or clarify issue1.5 Rights and responsibilities of customer and workplace are determined and communicated to customer?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Customer issue and associated feelings and opinions are identified1.2 Facts relating to the issue are determined using appropriate communication skills1.3 Workplace procedures and manufacturer or supplier policy relating to the issue are sourced and interpreted1.4 Further information is researched as required to confirm or clarify issue1.5 Rights and responsibilities of customer and workplace are determined and communicated to customer.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Examine the nature of the issue

elements.title: Resolve or escalate the issue

pcs.text: Implications of the issue for customer and workplace are analysed and determined, and suitable resolution options are identified2.2 Options for resolving the issue are explained and negotiated with customer according to workplace policies and procedures2.3 Information required to assist customer in evaluating service and product options that best meet customer needs is provided2.4 Complaints requiring attention from an external party are actioned by referring to appropriate person according to workplace procedures2.5 Where a resolution cannot be negotiated and agreed, issue is escalated to appropriate person
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implications of the issue for customer and workplace are analysed and determined, and suitable resolution options are identified2.2 Options for resolving the issue are explained and negotiated with customer according to workplace policies and procedures2.3 Information required to assist customer in evaluating service and product options that best meet customer needs is provided2.4 Complaints requiring attention from an external party are actioned by referring to appropriate person according to workplace procedures2.5 Where a resolution cannot be negotiated and agreed, issue is escalated to appropriate person?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implications of the issue for customer and workplace are analysed and determined, and suitable resolution options are identified2.2 Options for resolving the issue are explained and negotiated with customer according to workplace policies and procedures2.3 Information required to assist customer in evaluating service and product options that best meet customer needs is provided2.4 Complaints requiring attention from an external party are actioned by referring to appropriate person according to workplace procedures2.5 Where a resolution cannot be negotiated and agreed, issue is escalated to appropriate person.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Resolve or escalate the issue

elements.title: Document issue and outcome

pcs.text: Record issue, outcome and customer feedback according to workplace procedures3.2 Report agreed outcome to appropriate person according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record issue, outcome and customer feedback according to workplace procedures3.2 Report agreed outcome to appropriate person according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record issue, outcome and customer feedback according to workplace procedures3.2 Report agreed outcome to appropriate person according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Document issue and outcome
